description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Use the security department’s contact email from the main contacts section to subscribe to the security status alerts form on the notice page.
tasks.name: Use the security department’s contact email from the main contacts section to subscribe to the security status alerts form on the notice page.
tasks.description: Use the security department’s contact email from the main contacts section to subscribe to the security status alerts form on the notice page.

tasks.instruction: For a large order over $500, use the sales contact email intended for enterprise or large orders from the department contacts list to submit a pre-sales inquiry with the matching order size and reason.
tasks.name: For a large order over $500, use the sales contact email intended for enterprise or large orders from the department contacts list to submit a pre-sales inquiry with the matching order size and reason.
tasks.description: For a large order over $500, use the sales contact email intended for enterprise or large orders from the department contacts list to submit a pre-sales inquiry with the matching order size and reason.

tasks.instruction: Use the third email address in the “All Protected Contact Addresses” list as the affected address when submitting an issue report about an email visibility problem.
tasks.name: Use the third email address in the “All Protected Contact Addresses” list as the affected address when submitting an issue report about an email visibility problem.
tasks.description: Use the third email address in the “All Protected Contact Addresses” list as the affected address when submitting an issue report about an email visibility problem.

tasks.instruction: Switch the notice page interface to Spanish, open the FAQ entry that asks why this page is shown, and reveal and copy the example protected email address mentioned there.
tasks.name: Switch the notice page interface to Spanish, open the FAQ entry that asks why this page is shown, and reveal and copy the example protected email address mentioned there.
tasks.description: Switch the notice page interface to Spanish, open the FAQ entry that asks why this page is shown, and reveal and copy the example protected email address mentioned there.

tasks.instruction: In the settings view, change the bot protection level to a medium setting, reveal the sample protected email, add its domain (without the username) to the allowed domains list, and save the updated configuration.
tasks.name: In the settings view, change the bot protection level to a medium setting, reveal the sample protected email, add its domain (without the username) to the allowed domains list, and save the updated configuration.
tasks.description: In the settings view, change the bot protection level to a medium setting, reveal the sample protected email, add its domain (without the username) to the allowed domains list, and save the updated configuration.

tasks.instruction: Use the on-page help search to open the first article about a non-working contact form, reveal the backup support email in its alternative contact section, and submit that address with a 4-star feedback rating in the article’s feedback form.
tasks.name: Use the on-page help search to open the first article about a non-working contact form, reveal the backup support email in its alternative contact section, and submit that address with a 4-star feedback rating in the article’s feedback form.
tasks.description: Use the on-page help search to open the first article about a non-working contact form, reveal the backup support email in its alternative contact section, and submit that address with a 4-star feedback rating in the article’s feedback form.

tasks.instruction: From the contact options, choose the billing email with an estimated response time under 48 hours, use its selector to open the billing query form, select the invoice-related topic, and start the query with that email prefilled.
tasks.name: From the contact options, choose the billing email with an estimated response time under 48 hours, use its selector to open the billing query form, select the invoice-related topic, and start the query with that email prefilled.
tasks.description: From the contact options, choose the billing email with an estimated response time under 48 hours, use its selector to open the billing query form, select the invoice-related topic, and start the query with that email prefilled.

tasks.instruction: Compare the US and EU regional support contacts, set the EU option as the preferred region, then update regional preferences so that Europe is saved as the default region.
tasks.name: Compare the US and EU regional support contacts, set the EU option as the preferred region, then update regional preferences so that Europe is saved as the default region.
tasks.description: Compare the US and EU regional support contacts, set the EU option as the preferred region, then update regional preferences so that Europe is saved as the default region.

tasks.instruction: Reveal the support and marketing departmental email addresses, extract their unique domains, and add both domains as a comma-separated list to the safelisted domains configuration before saving.
tasks.name: Reveal the support and marketing departmental email addresses, extract their unique domains, and add both domains as a comma-separated list to the safelisted domains configuration before saving.
tasks.description: Reveal the support and marketing departmental email addresses, extract their unique domains, and add both domains as a comma-separated list to the safelisted domains configuration before saving.
